iotsitewise.project.CfnAbout:
Creates a project in the specified portal.

**Note**  
Make sure that the project name and description don't contain confidential information.

iotsitewise.project.AssetIds.Description: A list that contains the IDs of each asset associated with the project.

iotsitewise.project.PortalId.Description: The ID of the portal in which to create the project.

iotsitewise.project.ProjectName.Description: A friendly name for the project.

iotsitewise.project.Tags.Description: A list of key-value pairs that contain metadata for the project. For more information, see [Tagging your AWS IoT SiteWise resources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot-sitewise/latest/userguide/tag-resources.html) in the *AWS IoT SiteWise User Guide*.
